claim_pointer: Abstract: "clinically actionable, universally applicable predictor"; Impact: "used to select anti-PD-1 therapy"
evidence_pointer: Methods—Study population: 72 adults underwent resection; no defined anti-PD-1 intended-use comparison
concern: Overall-survival association in a retrospective resection cohort cannot identify differential anti-PD-1 benefit or immediate clinical utility.
resolution_test: Remove treatment-selection and deployment claims, or validate a locked assay in an independent intended-use cohort with a credible score-by-treatment interaction, calibration, clinical baselines, and decision utility.

claim_pointer: Discussion: "validated in an independent subset"
evidence_pointer: Methods—Score construction: genes, signs, cutoffs, and missing-value rules selected in all 72 patients before the 70:30 split
concern: The nominal validation subset influenced all model choices and cannot provide an unbiased estimate of generalization.
resolution_test: Lock the complete pipeline without assessment-data access and evaluate once in a patient-independent external cohort; label nested resampling as internal only.

claim_pointer: Abstract and Results: EVA1 depletion "sensitized" HCC to anti-PD-1
evidence_pointer: Methods—Mouse experiment: "All mice received anti-PD-1"
concern: Without untreated arms, the experiment cannot separate an EVA1 growth effect from an EVA1-by-anti-PD-1 interaction.
resolution_test: Run a randomized, blinded factorial EVA1-status by anti-PD-1 experiment with target engagement, immune readouts, replication, and an interaction estimate, or remove sensitization claims.

claim_pointer: Title and Introduction: "universal therapeutic vulnerability"; "first clinically actionable"
evidence_pointer: Reported evidence: eight single-cell patients, one 72-patient centre, two cell lines, one ten-mouse experiment, and two references
concern: The manuscript does not substantiate an outstanding interdisciplinary conceptual advance at Nature's Article threshold.
resolution_test: Demonstrate the precise advance against current literature and close the independent human and causal-mechanistic chain; otherwise narrow the contribution and retarget after technical correction.

claim_pointer: Data and code availability: code, coefficients, patient-level data, seeds, and versions unavailable
evidence_pointer: Methods invokes a locked formula but does not report executable coefficients, transformations, cutoff, or missing-data rules
concern: The central score and computational workflow cannot be reconstructed, contradicting deployability and preventing audit.
resolution_test: Release the complete score and assay specification, executable code, seeds, environment, raw/processed data or controlled access, and demonstrate an independent rerun.

claim_pointer: Results: 1,842 nominally significant genes and an immune-evasion programme
evidence_pointer: Methods—Single-cell discovery: eight patients; cells treated as independent; nominal P<0.05; no multiplicity correction
concern: Cell-level inference inflates precision for a tumour-level contrast and leaves the discovery set without a controlled false-discovery rate.
resolution_test: Reanalyse using patient/sample as the unit with paired or mixed modelling, effect sizes, false-discovery control, and patient-level robustness.

claim_pointer: Results: score remains significant and shows high discrimination
evidence_pointer: Methods: 27 genes plus 18 covariates, 31 deaths, stepwise selection, no calibration or clinical baseline
concern: The model is highly adaptive relative to the event count and performance lacks uncertainty, calibration, stability, and incremental-value evidence.
resolution_test: Use a prespecified parsimonious or penalized strategy, quantify optimism and coefficient stability, report intervals and diagnostics, compare clinical baselines, and validate externally.

claim_pointer: Abstract AUC 0.91; Results AUC 0.84; Figure 3 legend AUC 0.86
evidence_pointer: Methods and Results: median survivor follow-up 18 months and many three-year statuses unavailable
concern: The same apparent endpoint has three values and unresolved censoring, so no authoritative or interpretable performance estimate exists.
resolution_test: Reconcile source output across text and figure; specify estimator, risk set, events, censoring, analysis set, and uncertainty; remove the horizon if unsupported.

claim_pointer: Results: EVA1 "directly suppresses anti-tumour immunity" and is causal
evidence_pointer: Methods—Functional experiments: one guide; no rescue, target engagement, orthogonal perturbation, or immune-cell co-culture
concern: One-guide tumour-only phenotypes cannot exclude off-target or growth-stress effects and do not demonstrate a direct immune mechanism.
resolution_test: Add orthogonal perturbation, rescue, target engagement, immune-functional assays, causal ordering, and an appropriate in-vivo immune model, or lower the claim.

claim_pointer: Results: day-21 xenografts smaller and ready for therapeutic development
evidence_pointer: Methods—Mouse experiment: n=5/group, cage-order allocation, unblinded measurement, one time-point test, no replicate
concern: The small nonrandomized, unblinded, unreplicated experiment lacks target engagement and immune readouts required for general mechanistic inference.
resolution_test: Repeat with randomized allocation, blinded longitudinal measurement, sample-size rationale, target engagement, immune/toxicity readouts, transparent attrition, and independent replication.

claim_pointer: Ethics: generic compliance statement
evidence_pointer: Manuscript states committee, protocol, consent procedure, animal protocol, and humane endpoints are not reported
concern: Human and animal oversight cannot be verified from the manuscript; the reporting deficiency is definite even though underlying approval status is not assessable.
resolution_test: Report named committees, identifiers, consent or waiver basis, animal welfare monitoring, humane endpoints, and matching editorial documentation.

claim_pointer: Visible headings: Abstract; Impact and implications; Patients and methods before Results
evidence_pointer: Frozen profile N007 element sequence; authorship and declaration materials not supplied
concern: The visible architecture does not follow the frozen Nature Article sequence, while absent package components remain not assessable.
resolution_test: At package preparation, map all supplied and separate materials to N007 and remove or relocate journal-mismatched elements.

claim_pointer: Impact and Discussion: score selects anti-PD-1 and supports immediate use
evidence_pointer: Methods—Study population: retrospective resection cohort with no defined treated-versus-comparator analysis
concern: A prognostic survival cohort cannot establish anti-PD-1 response, benefit, or treatment-effect modification.
resolution_test: Remove predictive/actionable claims or demonstrate a locked score-by-treatment interaction in an independent intended-use cohort with calibration and utility.

claim_pointer: Abstract and Results: EVA1 sensitizes xenografts to anti-PD-1
evidence_pointer: Methods—Mouse experiment: all mice received anti-PD-1
concern: The smaller-tumour result can be fully explained by treatment-independent growth reduction and does not identify sensitization.
resolution_test: Narrow to the observed shared-treatment contrast or run a randomized factorial interaction experiment in an immune-competent HCC-relevant model.

claim_pointer: Results: EVA1 excludes T cells and directly suppresses anti-tumour immunity
evidence_pointer: Eight-tumour correlation; one-guide tumour-only perturbation; no rescue, target engagement, immune co-culture, or immune phenotype
concern: The evidence cannot distinguish causality from correlation, off-target effects, altered proliferation, or indirect transcriptional responses.
resolution_test: Add independent guides, rescue, target engagement, immune-functional phenotypes, and causal ordering, or restrict the conclusion to association and a tumour-intrinsic perturbation phenotype.

claim_pointer: Title, Impact, and Discussion: universal; all major aetiologies; immediately deployable
evidence_pointer: Methods: one centre; 58 viral, 9 metabolic, 5 other/undocumented; no external cohort or immunotherapy setting
concern: The sampled population cannot support universality across aetiologies, stages, centres, assays, or treatment settings.
resolution_test: Remove universal/deployable language or externally validate a locked assay prospectively across prespecified diverse intended-use populations and settings.

claim_pointer: Introduction: none provides a universal guide; first clinically actionable score
evidence_pointer: Sparse two-reference context plus unresolved clinical and mechanism gates
concern: The manuscript has not demonstrated either literature priority or the clinical-mechanistic advance required for broad flagship significance.
resolution_test: Provide a current systematic comparison, exact novelty statement, baseline benchmarking, and causal/intended-use evidence; otherwise remove priority claims and reposition.

claim_pointer: Methods: high- versus low-infiltration tumours; Results: T-cell score
evidence_pointer: No definition of cell classes, score genes, threshold, aggregation, or handling of tumour composition and aetiology
concern: The discovery phenotype is not reproducibly defined and may reflect purity, composition, or a data-derived split rather than immune evasion.
resolution_test: Define and justify the measure and cutoff, show all eight tumour values, assess relevant covariates and influential tumours, and test alternative definitions.

claim_pointer: Results: 1,842-gene immune-evasion programme
evidence_pointer: Methods: eight tumours; 46,218 cells treated independently; nominal threshold; no multiplicity control
concern: The programme may be driven by pseudoreplication, unequal cell counts, and false positives rather than patient-level biology.
resolution_test: Use patient-aware inference, false-discovery control, effect sizes, and leave-one-patient-out robustness, then regenerate downstream candidates.

claim_pointer: Discussion: EVA1 is the causal link between the five-gene score and immune escape
evidence_pointer: Only EVA1 is perturbed; score genes, coefficients, and linkage to EVA1-dependent biology are not exposed
concern: Perturbing one highest-ranked gene does not establish that EVA1 mediates a multigene score or that all genes form one pathway.
resolution_test: Report the full score; test relationships among genes and EVA1; show EVA1 perturbation changes the defined programme; otherwise separate the score and EVA1 narratives.

claim_pointer: Impact: measured at diagnosis; Discussion: across treatment settings
evidence_pointer: Methods: postsurgical resection cohort; 18-month median survivor follow-up; many three-year statuses unavailable
concern: A postsurgical association does not establish diagnosis-time performance across stages or treatment settings, and the prediction horizon is immature.
resolution_test: Define time origin, intended-use population, censoring and treatment pathways; report valid time-dependent performance; restrict claims to the observed setting unless externally validated.

claim_pointer: Throughout: target named only EVA1; Methods: one CRISPR guide
evidence_pointer: No approved symbol/transcript, guide sequence, assay identifiers, antibody details, or target-engagement result
concern: The molecular target and reported PD-L1/interferon effects cannot be independently interpreted or replicated.
resolution_test: Provide exact gene/transcript and guide identifiers, target sequence, depletion quantification, assay/antibody identifiers, normalization, and replicate-level results.

claim_pointer: Discussion assigns reference 2 to score-specific anti-PD-1 monotherapy benefit
evidence_pointer: Reference 2 metadata title concerns atezolizumab plus bevacizumab in unresectable HCC
concern: The cited regimen and study do not directly establish that this score predicts anti-PD-1 monotherapy benefit; exact full-text support remains unassessed.
resolution_test: Remove the claim or cite direct score-specific treatment-effect evidence; distinguish PD-1 monotherapy from PD-L1 plus anti-VEGF context.

claim_pointer: Results: PD-L1 decreased while three interferon transcripts increased, therefore direct immune suppression
evidence_pointer: Tumour-only cultures; genes, time course, effect sizes, and immune function are not reported
concern: The mixed molecular directions do not define a coherent immune-escape mechanism without context or functional testing.
resolution_test: Name transcripts, report timing/effect sizes, propose a testable pathway, and describe only the measured changes unless immune function is shown.

claim_pointer: Introduction and Results: therapeutic dependency; ready for development
evidence_pointer: Results: 19%–24% lower growth at 72 hours after genetic depletion
concern: Short-term genetic growth reduction does not establish selective dependency, druggability, therapeutic window, or tolerability.
resolution_test: Use bounded perturbation language or add tractable target engagement, selectivity, dose-response, durability, exposure, and toxicity evidence.

claim_pointer: Abstract: predicts mortality; Impact and Discussion: selects therapy and identifies benefit
evidence_pointer: Methods contains only an outcome-association cohort without treatment interaction
concern: The manuscript conflates prognostic association with predictive treatment-effect modification.
resolution_test: Reserve prognostic for outcome association and predictive for demonstrated interaction; define intended use consistently throughout.

claim_pointer: Discussion: concordance across data types demonstrates mechanism generality
evidence_pointer: Human association, tumour-cell perturbation, and xenograft comparison have different inferential layers
concern: The narrative merges heterogeneous evidence layers as if each independently demonstrated one mechanism.
resolution_test: Label each layer separately and state explicitly which causal links remain untested.

claim_pointer: Results: single-cell immune-evasion programme
evidence_pointer: Methods: tumour-level contrast from eight patients tested with cells as independent and no FDR control
concern: Patient-nested cells cannot serve as independent biological replicates for the reported population-level discovery.
resolution_test: Re-run with patient as unit using paired pseudobulk or a justified mixed model, control FDR, report effects and patient-influence analyses, and rebuild downstream candidates.

claim_pointer: Discussion: independent validation
evidence_pointer: Methods: all feature, coefficient, cutoff, and missing-data choices used the full cohort before splitting
concern: The nominal validation subset is contaminated by model development and cannot test transportability or unbiased performance.
resolution_test: Lock the assay and model before a genuinely independent external cohort, or label the work exploratory with honest internal validation and remove independent/actionable/universal claims.

claim_pointer: Impact and Discussion: score selects anti-PD-1
evidence_pointer: Methods: resection cohort with no defined treatment comparison or score-by-treatment interaction
concern: The clinical design estimates prognosis, not differential benefit from anti-PD-1.
resolution_test: Test a locked score-by-treatment interaction in an independent treated-versus-comparator setting with appropriate endpoints, calibration, and utility, or remove treatment-selection claims.

claim_pointer: Results: sensitizes HCC to anti-PD-1
evidence_pointer: Methods: control versus EVA1-depleted xenografts; every animal received anti-PD-1
concern: The design has no anti-PD-1 main-effect or EVA1-by-treatment interaction and cannot identify sensitization.
resolution_test: Run a powered randomized factorial experiment with blinded measurement, formal interaction analysis, target engagement, and immune compatibility, or narrow the claim.

claim_pointer: Abstract and Results: EVA1 is the direct causal immune-evasion driver
evidence_pointer: Methods: one guide, no rescue or target engagement, no immune co-culture; molecular readouts share the same cultures
concern: The perturbation package cannot exclude off-target or nonspecific growth effects and does not show immune function or direct causal ordering.
resolution_test: Add independent on-target perturbation, rescue, target engagement, gain/loss symmetry where justified, and immune-functional assays, or reduce causal language.

claim_pointer: Results: therapeutic mechanism and development readiness
evidence_pointer: Methods: n=5/group, cage-order allocation, unblinded measurement, terminal t-test, no replication; no immune or toxicity outcomes
concern: Allocation, measurement, sample-size, longitudinal, target-engagement, immune, and replication weaknesses undermine internal and translational validity.
resolution_test: Repeat with concealed randomization, blinding, sample-size rationale, longitudinal analysis, target engagement, immune/toxicity outcomes, transparent attrition, and independent replication.

claim_pointer: Abstract 0.91; Results 0.84; Figure 3 0.86
evidence_pointer: Methods and Results: 18-month median follow-up among survivors; many unknown three-year outcomes
concern: The endpoint may not be reliably estimable and the contradictory values prevent knowing which analysis supports the claim.
resolution_test: Define the estimand, censoring and risk set; use a time-dependent method with uncertainty; reconcile one value or choose a supported horizon.

claim_pointer: Title, Abstract, Impact, Discussion: universal and all aetiologies/settings
evidence_pointer: Methods: single-centre predominantly viral resection cohort with no external validation
concern: The sample does not support transportability across aetiologies, centres, assays, stages, or treatment settings.
resolution_test: Validate prospectively in multicentre diverse intended-use cohorts with prespecified subgroup calibration and heterogeneity, or remove universal scope.

claim_pointer: Mouse experiment and Ethics sections
evidence_pointer: Host strain/immune competence, sex, age, antibody identity, dose, housing, endpoints, exclusions, attrition, and approval identifiers are not reported
concern: Model interpretability, replicability, welfare, and compatibility with the proposed immune mechanism cannot be verified.
resolution_test: Report complete animal model, reagent, dosing, housing, allocation, outcome, welfare, attrition, and approval details; demonstrate immune-model compatibility.

claim_pointer: Methods—Study population: records with missing values excluded from each analysis
evidence_pointer: No flow, missingness pattern, per-analysis denominator, event count, or sensitivity analysis
concern: Different complete-case subsets may underlie results and selection due to missingness cannot be assessed.
resolution_test: Provide analysis flow, missingness by variable, denominator and events for every result, a prespecified strategy, and sensitivity analyses where warranted.

claim_pointer: Results: 1,842 genes nominate 27 downstream candidates
evidence_pointer: Methods: patient-level exposure, 46,218 cells treated as independent, nominal P<0.05, no multiplicity correction
concern: The unit mismatch invalidates standard errors and the discovery error rate, undermining downstream signature construction.
resolution_test: Use patient-aware paired inference, control multiplicity, report effects/uncertainty, and regenerate the signature from corrected discoveries.

claim_pointer: Discussion: independent validation
evidence_pointer: Methods: outcome-informed selection and tuning on all 72 patients before the 70:30 split
concern: The assessment subset influenced the model and its apparent AUC and survival separation are optimistically biased.
resolution_test: Evaluate a completely locked model externally or repeat the entire pipeline within nested resampling and reserve a never-accessed test set; label internal estimates honestly.

claim_pointer: Abstract 0.91; Results 0.84; Figure 3 0.86 for three-year mortality
evidence_pointer: Methods and Results: 31 deaths, 18-month median survivor follow-up, unknown status for many survivors
concern: The values conflict and censoring handling is unspecified, so performance may be biased, undefined, or unstable in the small nominal validation subset.
resolution_test: Reconcile a frozen output; specify population, horizon, risk set, events, censoring, time-dependent estimator, and interval; remove the horizon if follow-up is inadequate.

claim_pointer: Impact and Discussion: high AUC supports selecting anti-PD-1
evidence_pointer: Methods: prognosis after resection; no defined treatment, comparator, interaction, or decision threshold
concern: Mortality discrimination is not a treatment-selection estimand and cannot establish differential anti-PD-1 benefit.
resolution_test: Remove predictive treatment claims or estimate and externally validate a prespecified score-by-treatment interaction with calibration and decision-relevant performance.

claim_pointer: Abstract: sensitized xenografts; Results: P=0.048 under anti-PD-1
evidence_pointer: Methods: all mice received anti-PD-1
concern: The comparison estimates EVA1 depletion under shared exposure, not treatment sensitization.
resolution_test: Use a randomized factorial design with a prespecified interaction and interval, biological replication, and target engagement, or state only the observed shared-treatment contrast.

claim_pointer: Results: selected score remains significant
evidence_pointer: Methods: 45 candidate inputs, data-derived rules, 31 deaths, stepwise selection
concern: The adaptive degrees of freedom are excessive for the event count and selection uncertainty is ignored.
resolution_test: Justify sample size, reduce or penalize degrees of freedom, quantify optimism, shrinkage, and selection stability with nested resampling, and report uncertainty.

claim_pointer: Results: hazard ratio 2.4, P=0.04
evidence_pointer: Methods: PH assumption untested; no confidence intervals; formula, analysis n, events, and functional forms not reported
concern: The Cox effect is not interpretable or robust without precision, assumptions, exact model specification, and influential-observation diagnostics.
resolution_test: Report the complete model, denominators/events, intervals, PH and functional-form diagnostics, and a justified alternative if assumptions fail.

claim_pointer: Methods: records with missing values excluded from each analysis; rules selected on full data
evidence_pointer: No missingness table, per-analysis denominators, included/excluded comparison, or fold-contained strategy
concern: Undisclosed complete-case subsets can cause selection bias, noncomparable denominators, leakage, and irreproducibility.
resolution_test: Report missingness and exact denominators/events, compare excluded patients, prespecify handling within training folds, and conduct sensitivity analyses.

claim_pointer: Discussion: clinically actionable and immediate use
evidence_pointer: Methods: no calibration, decision curve, external cohort, independent assay, BCLC or clinical baseline
concern: Discrimination alone does not establish useful or incremental prediction, especially after leakage.
resolution_test: In independent data, report uncertainty, calibration, prediction error, thresholds, decision utility, failure analysis, and fair baseline comparisons.

claim_pointer: Results: Spearman r=-0.41, P=0.03
evidence_pointer: Figure 2 legend: association across eight tumours
concern: For eight independent tumours, the reported coefficient is incompatible with a conventional two-sided P=0.03, implying an incorrect unit, denominator, test, or transcription.
resolution_test: Provide the eight tumour pairs; state unit, ties, and implementation; recompute exact or permutation Spearman inference and reconcile Figure 2 and Results.

claim_pointer: Methods: locked five-gene formula
evidence_pointer: Data availability: model code, coefficients, patient data, seeds, and versions unavailable
concern: The predictor cannot be calculated, audited, or reproduced, and split/performance outputs cannot be regenerated.
resolution_test: Provide complete executable model specification, preprocessing, cutoff, rules, code, versions, seeds, split indices, data dictionary, and auditable data access.

claim_pointer: Results: P=0.048 at day 21
evidence_pointer: Methods: n=5/group, cage-order allocation, unblinded measurement, one endpoint, no replicate, no effect interval
concern: The fragile single P value is vulnerable to allocation, measurement, distributional, and influential-animal effects.
resolution_test: Repeat with concealed randomization, blinding, sample-size rationale, attrition reporting, longitudinal analysis, effects with intervals, influence checks, and replication.

claim_pointer: Results: 24% and 19% growth reductions plus PD-L1/transcript changes
evidence_pointer: Methods does not report biological replicate counts, runs, exclusions, distributions, uncertainty, or multiplicity
concern: The in-vitro effects cannot be evaluated for sampling uncertainty or independent reproducibility.
resolution_test: Report biological and technical nesting, independent runs, raw biological-unit data, effects with intervals, exclusions, multiplicity, and independent replication.

claim_pointer: Methods: continuous variables by t-tests; categorical variables by chi-squared tests
evidence_pointer: Contrasts, denominators, variance assumptions, paired structure, sparse-count handling, and diagnostics are not mapped
concern: The generic description cannot establish valid test selection, particularly for small subgroups.
resolution_test: Map every result to its biological unit and test; state assumptions, sparse alternatives, diagnostics, effects, and confidence intervals.

claim_pointer: Figure 3 and Discussion: validation and independent subset
evidence_pointer: Methods: full-data model development precedes the split
concern: The terminology falsely implies independence.
resolution_test: Use an exact internal post-selection label until a genuinely untouched cohort is evaluated.

claim_pointer: Methods: nominal two-sided P<0.05 considered significant for all analyses
evidence_pointer: No confirmatory/exploratory labels or multiplicity-family map
concern: The blanket threshold obscures analysis purpose and promotes dichotomous interpretation.
resolution_test: Label confirmatory versus exploratory analyses, define multiplicity families, and report exact P values with effects and intervals.

claim_pointer: Abstract and Discussion: clinically actionable, universally applicable, independently validated
evidence_pointer: Methods: full-cohort model construction and rules before splitting; no external cohort
concern: The internal split does not test a locked model or transportability, so the validation and universal claims are false relative to the workflow.
resolution_test: Evaluate a locked model externally with uncertainty, calibration, baselines, and transportability, or reframe as exploratory internal association and remove the claims.

claim_pointer: Impact and Discussion: score selects anti-PD-1 and is immediately deployable
evidence_pointer: Methods and Results: retrospective resection survival cohort; no anti-PD-1 comparison, interaction, threshold, calibration, or utility
concern: A prognostic association cannot be promoted to a treatment-selection biomarker.
resolution_test: Demonstrate independent intended-use score-by-treatment interaction and decision utility with a locked assay, or remove all treatment-selection/actionability/deployment claims.

claim_pointer: Results and Abstract: EVA1 excludes T cells, directly suppresses immunity, and is the causal driver
evidence_pointer: Eight-tumour correlation; one-guide monoculture changes; no rescue, target engagement, orthogonal perturbation, or immune phenotype
concern: The evidence is compatible with an EVA1 hypothesis but does not identify direct immune causation or exclude off-target and growth-related explanations.
resolution_test: Add orthogonal on-target perturbation, rescue, target engagement, immune-functional context, and mediation/ordering evidence, or replace direct causal claims with bounded observations.

claim_pointer: Abstract and Results: anti-PD-1 sensitization
evidence_pointer: Methods: every mouse received anti-PD-1; only EVA1 status differs
concern: The design estimates an EVA1 effect under one treatment condition and cannot identify drug-specific sensitization.
resolution_test: Run a prespecified factorial interaction design with biological replication and immune-response evidence, or remove sensitization and development-readiness claims.

claim_pointer: Abstract 0.91; Results 0.84; Figure 3 0.86
evidence_pointer: Methods and Results: 18-month median follow-up among survivors; many unknown three-year outcomes; estimator unspecified
concern: At least two values are wrong or refer to undisclosed analyses, and the horizon may be biased or undefined without censoring-aware estimation.
resolution_test: Reconcile one frozen output; define population, time origin, censoring, estimator, risk set, events, and uncertainty; remove the horizon if not reliably estimable.

claim_pointer: Results: reproducible immune-evasion programme
evidence_pointer: Methods and Figure 1: eight tumours; one point per cell; cells treated independently; no multiplicity correction
concern: The apparent sample size and discovery significance overstate patient-level evidence and do not control false discovery.
resolution_test: Use patient-aware paired inference, FDR control, effect uncertainty, and patient-level sensitivity before retaining the programme or downstream genes.

claim_pointer: Results: score remains significant and prognostic
evidence_pointer: Methods: 45 candidates, 31 deaths, stepwise selection, data-derived cutoffs, complete-case subsets, no PH test or intervals
concern: The selected model and hazard ratio are vulnerable to severe optimism, unstable selection, missing-data bias, and untested assumptions.
resolution_test: Use constrained or penalized modelling, repeat the full pipeline in resampling, report exact analysis population, assumptions, effects/intervals, optimism, stability, and clinical-baseline comparison.

claim_pointer: Impact and Discussion: all major aetiologies and treatment settings
evidence_pointer: Methods: one centre; predominantly viral; sparse metabolic/other groups; no external cohort
concern: The limitation paragraph acknowledges narrow sampling but the conclusion asserts the opposite transportability.
resolution_test: Validate adequately across prespecified aetiology and setting strata or limit claims to this single-centre resection cohort.

claim_pointer: Impact: immediately deployable; Methods: locked score
evidence_pointer: Data availability: formula components, code, coefficients, patient data, seeds, and versions unavailable
concern: The score cannot be calculated and key analyses cannot be rerun, directly contradicting deployability.
resolution_test: Report and release complete score specification, preprocessing, cutoff, missing rules, software, code, seeds, and auditable raw/processed data access.

claim_pointer: Reference note assigns ref 1 to no-prior-utility and ref 2 to score-specific anti-PD-1 benefit
evidence_pointer: Only two citation metadata records are supplied; ref 2 title concerns atezolizumab plus bevacizumab
concern: Metadata cannot certify exact semantic support, and the atomic claims are more specific than the supplied citation scope.
resolution_test: Inspect full text for exact supporting passages and evidence type; replace, qualify, or remove claims when support is indirect or mismatched; do not use external treatment context as score validation.

claim_pointer: Introduction and Discussion assertions lack visible numbered markers
evidence_pointer: A note after the reference list separately states intended citations
concern: The supplied manuscript does not show clause-level citation placement, so support boundaries are not auditable.
resolution_test: Place each numbered citation immediately after the atomic clause it supports and verify numbering and claim strength.

claim_pointer: Abstract AUC 0.91; Results AUC 0.84; Figure 3 Panel C AUC 0.86
evidence_pointer: Three supplied locations; figure image and model output unavailable
concern: A central performance estimate has three values, so no authoritative number supports the headline.
resolution_test: Recompute or retrieve the locked output; align endpoint, set, estimator, value, uncertainty, and source traceability across all locations.

claim_pointer: Abstract and Results: sensitization; Figure 4 legend: EVA1 depletion and xenograft volume
evidence_pointer: Methods: every mouse received anti-PD-1; no untreated comparator
concern: Figure 4 cannot close to a sensitization narrative because no treatment interaction is displayed or estimable.
resolution_test: Narrow the legend and text to the observed contrast, or add a factorial anti-PD-1 comparison with an interaction estimate and show it in Figure 4.

claim_pointer: Results: Spearman r=-0.41, P=0.03
evidence_pointer: Figure 2 legend: association across eight tumours
concern: Under standard eight-tumour Spearman inference, the coefficient and P value are incompatible; unit, test, or transcription is wrong or incomplete.
resolution_test: Recalculate from eight tumour pairs; report unit, ties, implementation, coefficient, P value, and interval; align Figure 2, Methods, and Results.

claim_pointer: Abstract and Figure 3: three-year mortality performance
evidence_pointer: Methods and Results: 18-month median survivor follow-up; no censoring method, risk set, event count, or interval
concern: Even after resolving the values, the three-year AUC remains uninterpretable without a censoring-aware estimand and denominators.
resolution_test: Define time-dependent estimator, censoring handling, analysis set, number at risk/events, and uncertainty; annotate Figure 3 accordingly.

claim_pointer: Discussion: independent subset; Figure 3: development and validation
evidence_pointer: Methods: full-cohort selection and rule setting before a same-cohort split
concern: The label creates a false narrative boundary and overstates what Figure 3 demonstrates.
resolution_test: Relabel as internal post-selection split evaluation or rebuild with a genuinely untouched cohort whose provenance is reported.

claim_pointer: Impact: score can be measured and used at diagnosis
evidence_pointer: Methods and availability omit genes, coefficients, signs, cutoffs, assay scale, missing rules, and code
concern: The five-gene score is not computable from the manuscript or any supplied display.
resolution_test: Provide a complete fixed score and assay specification in main text/table/supplement plus code that reproduces patient scores from named inputs.

claim_pointer: Figure legends 1–4 and Results values for cell growth, hazard ratio, AUC, and mouse P
evidence_pointer: The legends omit panel n, biological units, units/scales, error bars, tests, intervals, exclusions, and replicate structure
concern: The legends are not self-contained quantitative reports and prevent judgment of effect magnitude and precision.
resolution_test: For every panel, report biological/technical n, point meaning, units, summaries/error bars, test, exact P, effect with interval, exclusions, and replication, aligned to Methods and Results.

claim_pointer: Figure 1: each point represents one cell
evidence_pointer: Methods: only eight patients and cells treated as independent
concern: The visual foregrounds tens of thousands of cell points while obscuring the eight independent tumours and patient nesting.
resolution_test: Show patient identity and denominators, patient-level summaries or valid nested-model output, and explicitly separate cell count from biological replication.

claim_pointer: Abstract/Figure 3: three-year mortality; Methods/Results: overall survival; Results: Spearman r
evidence_pointer: Censoring relation and statistic notation are not harmonized
concern: The endpoint and correlation labels are ambiguous and can be mistaken for ordinary binary mortality or Pearson correlation.
resolution_test: Use one prespecified endpoint label with time origin/censoring and label the rank statistic as Spearman rho.

claim_pointer: Figure legends 1, 2, and 4 lack panel letters; Figure 3 mentions only Panel C
evidence_pointer: Supplied legends do not map every panel to Results citations
concern: The incomplete panel map impairs text-to-figure navigation and verification.
resolution_test: Add concise A–n descriptions for every panel and matching panel citations in Results.
